name: faba-protocol
description: VectraFi FABA Protocol MCP Server — inspect open bounties, query live treasury state, generate EIP-191 signing templates, build signature-verified settlement payloads, and stream live treasury telemetry for autonomous agent runtimes.

tools.name: inspect_faba_bounties
tools.description: Fetch open issue backlogs and agent task items from the VectraFi GitHub repository

tools.name: get_protocol_state
tools.description: Query active transaction volumes and pooled sandbox parameters from the SQLite ledger

tools.name: get_agent_balance
tools.description: Look up the sandbox ledger balance for a given agent_id from workspace/bank.db

tools.name: generate_eip191_template
tools.description: Generate an execution-ready EIP-191 payload signature schema for swap or deposit operations

tools.name: build_transfer_payload
tools.description: Build the exact JSON body and compact signing string for POST /api/v1/settlement/transfer

tools.name: build_bounty_claim_payload
tools.description: Build the exact JSON body and compact signing string for POST /api/v1/settlement/claim-bounty

tools.name: get_treasury_telemetry
tools.description: Fetch live treasury analytics from the core-exchange: fee accumulation, transaction count, total volume, and active wallet count
